title: スプリングSの後に・クラシック三冠へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her daily unrelenting training, Mihono
Bourbon manages to complete the Spring Stakes
with flying colors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next race will be the first step toward finally
achieving her dream. Ahead of her, the Satsuki
Sho awaits.
